text: Our paper on Optically Transparent Metamaterial has been successfully accepted in Advanced Composites and Hybrid Materials.🎉🎉🎉
恭喜苏浩维等获第十四届南京理工大学大学生机械创新设计大赛一等奖，指导老师李大伟。
恭喜孙成涛、廖雯婷获“和平杯”第十一届南京理工大学武器创新设计大赛特等奖，指导老师李大伟。
Our paper on Rigid-Flexible Interlocked Metastructures has been successfully accepted in Science Advances.🎉🎉🎉
恭喜孙成涛获第三十四届南京理工大学“创新杯”大学生课外学术科技作品竞赛特等奖，指导老师李大伟。
恭喜姜涵文同学被推荐江苏省2025届优秀毕业设计（论文），指导老师李大伟。
恭喜许天琪、刘兴、刘昊洋等同学获第三届特种装备创新设计大赛全国三等奖，指导老师李大伟。
Our paper on electromagnetic absorption mechanism of TPMS-based metastructures has been successfully accepted in Advanced Functional Materials.
Our paper on coding for electromagnetic absorbing metastructure has been successfully accepted in Composites Part B: Engineering.
Our paper on 3d reconfigurable electromagnetic wave-absorbing metastructure is accepted to Advanced Materials.
恭喜黄御桐、周逸凡同学获2024届校级优秀毕业设计（论文），指导老师李大伟。
恭喜孙成涛、许天琪等同学获第十届南京理工大学武器创新设计大赛二等奖两项，指导老师李大伟。
恭喜计忠凯、孙成涛同学获2023年江苏省普通高等学校优秀本科毕业设计（论文）奖，指导老师李大伟。
Our paper on AI-aided design and optimization of metastructure for controllable anisotropy has been successfully published in “Engineering Structures”.
Our paper on Functionally Gradient Metastructure for electromagnetic absorbing metastructure has been successfully published in “Composites Part B: Engineering”.
Our paper on modular electromagnetic absorbing metastructure has been successfully published in “Composites Part B: Engineering”.
恭喜安庆、王港、曲植、樊瑞疆获“第一届全国先进结构技术挑战赛”特等奖，指导老师李大伟。
恭喜计忠凯、孙成涛同学被推荐江苏省2023届优秀毕业设计（论文），指导老师李大伟。
恭喜孙成涛同学在第四届全国高校航空航天类专业本科毕业设计成果交流会中获特等奖，指导老师李大伟。
Our paper on 3d electromagnetic wave-absorbing metastructure is accepted to Advanced Materials.
I join Nanjing University of Science and Technology as an Assistant Professor.
